S.FORM: United kingdom Itini i 54 00 N, 2 00 W, noYoropi ko United Kingdom. Polong no sekalay i 243,610 sq km "saka 80 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 241,930 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,680 sq km " Polong i 64,430,428 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 71%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 11.90%, malo no roma to a sera 17.10%. siyoto O London ko Siyoto. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Charles III, patirengan a romi'ad i 2022 Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i **,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un ko~u sijo~uto~u. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i ¶ńßar…ĺ…ôs iii, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
